TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Samaanen milekakawa "Misatatad to Taywan"? == "No toic ngiha kowaping calay" paini to salongoc no Taywan, Taywan ato Congko sifo saki "misatatad" a salicylic pisapinangan, saka I'ayawen ko sakafana' to saca'of: I likisi no Taywan ato aniniay pangangan Sa'ayaway maro'ay finawlan o nisowal a "Yincumin" finacadan, o tato'asan nangra pinapinaay to ko patekan no miheca ma'orip tonini a kanatal. I 17 sician, o Netherlan tamdaw ato Spain tamdaw micalap to alongan sa'etal no Taywan. O Europe tamdaw pako "Formosa" saan ko pitahidang to Taywan itiya. Mancin i 1684 miheca pala no Fujian sakowan ko Taywan, tangasa i 1885 miheca pala o cecayay to sa'etal no Congko demakan ko Taywan. Mapidah ko Congko i saki Jiawu laloodan, o Macin i 1895 miheca mapakelac ko Dipong to Taywan, nicalapan no Dipong itiya. I 1945 miheca paherek ko saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, mapatodong ko Conghua minko sifo ko Taywan. Ikor malalood ko laloma'an no kitakit, o Congko kongcantang mipidahay to sofitay no KMT, nanoya i 1949 miheca laliwan no Komin sifo a tayni Taywan, ikor masiday ko Conghua minko a kacingangan. Ci Mao Zedong itira i Congko patireng to Conghua renmin sakapot sifo, mihapiw o dayhiw no Congko (halo Taywan) dengan marecokay sifo, ato midotocay to salongoc no Conghua minko. Paenarar i kasakitakit a Taywan Ikor no pinapina mo'etep mihecaan, itiniay i Taypi a Conghua minko sifo mihapiw to o tada cisalongocay to Congko a sifo saan. nika i 1971 miheca, Linhoko mihayda milayap to Conghua renmin lekapot o dengan dayhiw no Congko, oya Conghua minko sifo sa'icel sa to " caay ko mamalatosa" ko pakayraan saan a miliyas to Linhoko. Ikor to, o kasakitakit ala patiretireng sa to Congko no sakipapotal kakiharan, makaketon to Taypi. Tahamatini ira ho ko 12 kasacofelan kitakit to Taywan, saheto katimolay Taypinyang ato Caribbean riyar a kanatal kitakit, tinako Tuvalu, Belize. Masamatira, o 'alomanay Europ a kitakit ira ko kasasikihar to caayay ko no sifo a kaainian, mihayda to passport no Taywan , saka o Taywan ato nia kitakit ira i tadamanay maci patireng to kadademakan no Tarokos a citodongay Dayhiw. O finawlan no Taywan micomod to 'alomanay kitakit caay pitoki to fica. O Amilika nai 1979 miheca makaketon ko kasakihar to Taywan, nika midotoc to sarikec padamso to todong no sapidama. Midotoc to no Washington "cecay ko Congko" a telek, o Amilika to saki salongoc no Taywan awaay ko pali'ayaw no kaitiraan. Saka caay pisawad ko Congko sapiloodaw to Taywan to sapi'emet. Ono Beijing pasi Taywan ko pasadak to matiyaay no Hongkong to "Cecay kitakit tosa ko sakowan" a todong, mitelek paini to satakaraway a niyah pikowan. Nika awaay ko cecay a kasarekad ko micokeray tonini a todong. O pisolap to finawlan no Taywan i, no Taywan tamdaw mangalay oyanan to ko kasasikihar 'alomanay finawlan. Doedoen ko no Congko a sowal, i 1971 miheca mihayda ko Linhoko saka 2758 haw a nitelakan pasowal o Conghua renmin kapolongan o cecay matatodongay sifo a Congko saan, o nian ko pikotay no Beijing to Taypi itira i Linhoko kaitiraan no Congko, o saka saan i sarikec no kasakitakit mihai t oTaywan ono Congko. O papotalay kakeridan no Congko: 2758 haw nitelakan awaay ko kaoratan, o papotalay kakeridan no Taywan: o papaterep to sapiorat to kasakitakit saan. Taypi sifo miliyang o caay ho ka patireng konini, nawhani nitelekan awaay masowal ko Taywan ato salongoc a todong. O Masatataday to kitakit ko Taywan? Pakoniyah sa ko finawlan no Taywan misinkiw to kakeridan tamdaw, ira ko piemet no Taywan a sifo to nitelekan a sofal, ira ko no niyah a sofitay, payso ato passport. Talacowa caay ka sangila' ko pihayda no 'alomanay kitakit, nika so'elin ko piraoy to misatekeday a kaitiraan. Sowal sa ko sifo no Taywan, o cecay cikowanay kitakit ko Conghua minko, awaay ko todong no Beijing. O roma sato, ona caay ho pikowan ko Congko to Taywan, saka awaay ko tatodong mihidefong to pisingkiw no Taywan to kakeridan tamdaw. Falicen ko ngangan Taywan nikapolongan kitakit han? Ano haenen caay ko rahodayay, ano caay pihayda ko Lifayin misalof to kimpo, ta midemak to polong no finawlan kapolongan pitopa, caay ko ni Lai Cingde congtong rahodayay a pihapiw manga'ayto. Pisalof to kimpo itini i Lifayin salongan sepat malitoloay ko Lifawiyin micokeray ta mahayda. Oya citodongay mikowan a Mincintang ato papotalay Komintang itini i Lifayin a ngangan a tamdaw mato malalenay. Nai 2016 mihecaan padoedo mikowan a Mincintang awaay ko sapicikerohaw to sapifalic to kimpo. Oya papotalay Komintang masamawmaw miliyang to sapifalicaw to ngangan. Masamaan ko sowal ko congtong no Taywan? I'ayaw to piapina miheca 'ayaw no pisingkiw to congtong ni Lai Cingde i mato o mamilaheci to "Misatatad to Taywan a matayalay" kako sanay ningra, o "Micikcikay tamdaw" saan ko Beijing i cingraan. Sacisowal sa ci Lai Cingde, o niyah harateng i, o Taywan haw i o cecay misatatadan a kitakit, orasaka mimaan ho mihapiw misatatad. Na macakat i 2024 mihecaan i, kinapinapina paini ci Lai Cingde, o Conghua minko ato Conghua renmin nikapolongan "caay ka sasi niraay", sacisowal sa ko Beijing, onini to paratatenga ningra to Congko ato Taywan o masasitataday kitakit, orasaka oninian ko sapicikeroh to Misatatad to Taywan sanay a sowalan. Ira ko pidoedoan rikec sapifo'ot no Congko to Misatatad no Taywan haw? I 2005 miheca 3 folad, Congko laovcan mihayda to "Miliyang micikcik to kitakit a rikec", o patodong no Congko to i Taywanay "micikcikay to kitakit" ano eca "palasawaday to saka lekapot a todong" saki Taywan o papakayni i lalood no sofitay a demak ko pidoedoan no rikec, nika onini a rikec o madodemay, awaay ko padamso to o sasamaanen. Reuters DW kowaping ira i Instagram, manga'ay mikilim i dw. chinese, misatalolong masapinang ko cuka ato piparatoh. ¬© 2025 miheca Germany laciw (ngiha) salongoc paini: onini laloma' ni sowalan ira ko sadama to mitiliday salongoc, ano awaay ko nano patodong no Germany laciw (ngiha), tatiih midemak. Maanan caayay ka tatodong o mamilitadah, citodong to rikec a satefoc.
S.PHON: == samaan…ôn mi…ĺ…ôkakawa "misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan"? == "no~u to~ui ¶ Ňčińßa ko~uwapiŇč ¶a…ĺaj" paini to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u tajwan, tajwan ato~u ¶o~uŇčko~u sifo~u saki "misatata…¨~…ģ" a sa…ĺi ¶j…ĺi ¶ pisapinaŇčan, saka i °ajaw…ôn ko~u sakafana ° to~u sa ¶a °o~uf: i …ĺikisi no~u tajwan ato~u aniniaj paŇčaŇčan sa °ajawaj maro~u °aj finaw…ĺan o~u niso~uwa…ĺ a "jin ¶o~u~umin" fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u tato~u °asan naŇčra pinapinaaj to~u ko~u pat…ôkan no~u mińß…ô ¶a ma °o~urip to~unini a kanata…ĺ. i ** si ¶ian, o~u n…ôtńß…ôr…ĺan tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u spain tam…¨~…ģaw mi ¶a…ĺap to~u a…ĺo~uŇčan sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u tajwan. o~u …ôo~u~uro~up…ô tam…¨~…ģaw pako~u "fo~urmo~usa" saan ko~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u tajwan itija. man ¶in i **** mińß…ô ¶a pa…ĺa no~u fo~u~ujian sako~uwan ko~u tajwan, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a pa…ĺa o~u ¶…ô ¶ajaj to~u sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u …¨~…ģ…ômakan ko~u tajwan. mapi…¨~…ģańß ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u i saki *iawo~u~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan, o~u ma ¶in i **** mińß…ô ¶a ¶o~uŇčko~u, o~u saka saan i sarik…ô ¶ no~u kasakitakit mińßai t o~utajwan o~uno~u ¶o~uŇčko~u. o~u papo~uta…ĺaj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u: **** ńßaw nit…ô…ĺakan awaaj ko~u kao~uratan, o~u papo~uta…ĺaj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan: o~u papat…ôr…ôp to~u sapio~urat to~u kasakitakit saan. tajpi sifo~u mi…ĺijaŇč o~u ¶aaj ńßo~u ka patir…ôŇč ko~unini, nawńßani nit…ô…ĺ…ôkan awaaj maso~uwa…ĺ ko~u tajwan ato~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč. o~u masatata…¨~…ģaj to~u kitakit ko~u tajwan? pako~unijańß sa ko~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan misinkiw to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw, ira ko~u pi…ôm…ôt no~u tajwan a sifo~u to~u nit…ô…ĺ…ôkan a so~ufa…ĺ, ira ko~u no~u nijańß a so~ufitaj, pajso~u ato~u passpo~urt. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ka saŇči…ĺa ° ko~u pińßaj…¨~…ģa no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj kitakit, nika so~u °…ô…ĺin ko~u pirao~uj to~u misat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj a kaitiraan. so~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u sifo~u no~u tajwan, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj ¶iko~uwanaj kitakit ko~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u, awaaj ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč. o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~una ¶aaj ńßo~u piko~uwan ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u tajwan, saka awaaj ko~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mińßi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč to~u pisiŇčkiw no~u tajwan to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw. fa…ĺi ¶…ôn ko~u ŇčaŇčan tajwan nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan kitakit ńßan? ano~u ńßa…ôn…ôn ¶aaj ko~u rańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj, ano~u ¶aaj pińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u …ĺifajin misa…ĺo~uf to~u kimpo~u, ta mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finaw…ĺan kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan pito~upa, ¶aaj ko~u ni …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč rańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj a pińßapiw maŇča °ajto~u. pisa…ĺo~uf to~u kimpo~u itini i …ĺifajin sa…ĺo~uŇčan s…ôpat ma…ĺito~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u …ĺifawijin mi ¶o~uk…ôraj ta mańßaj…¨~…ģa. o~uja ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj miko~uwan a min ¶intaŇč ato~u papo~uta…ĺaj ko~umintaŇč itini i …ĺifajin a ŇčaŇčan a tam…¨~…ģaw mato~u ma…ĺa…ĺ…ônaj. nai **** mińß…ô ¶aan pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u miko~uwan a min ¶intaŇč awaaj ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńßaw to~u sapifa…ĺi ¶ to~u kimpo~u. o~uja papo~uta…ĺaj ko~umintaŇč masamawmaw mi…ĺijaŇč to~u sapifa…ĺi ¶aw to~u ŇčaŇčan. masamaan ko~u so~uwa…ĺ ko~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč no~u tajwan? i °ajaw to~u piapina mińß…ô ¶a °ajaw no~u pisiŇčkiw to~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ni …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô i mato~u o~u mami…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u "misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan a mataja…ĺaj" kako~u sanaj niŇčra, o~u "mi ¶ik ¶ikaj tam…¨~…ģaw" saan ko~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč i ¶iŇčraan. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô, o~u nijańß ńßarat…ôŇč i, o~u tajwan ńßaw i o~u ¶…ô ¶aj misatata…¨~…ģan a kitakit, o~urasaka mimaan ńßo~u mińßapiw misatata…¨~…ģ. na ma ¶akat i **** mińß…ô ¶aan i, kinapinapina paini ¶i …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô, o~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u ato~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua r…ônmin nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan " ¶aaj ka sasi niraaj", sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč, o~unini to~u paratat…ôŇča niŇčra to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u ato~u tajwan o~u masasitata…¨~…ģaj kitakit, o~urasaka o~uninian ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan sanaj a so~uwa…ĺan. ira ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan rik…ô ¶ sapifo~u °o~ut no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u misatata…¨~…ģ no~u tajwan ńßaw? i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶o~uŇčko~u …ĺao~ub~v ¶an mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~u "mi…ĺijaŇč mi ¶ik ¶ik to~u kitakit a rik…ô ¶", o~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u i tajwanaj "mi ¶ik ¶ikaj to~u kitakit" ano~u …ô ¶a "pa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģaj to~u saka …ĺ…ôkapo~ut a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč" saki tajwan o~u papakajni i …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u so~ufitaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan no~u rik…ô ¶, nika o~unini a rik…ô ¶ o~u ma…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģ…ômaj, awaaj ko~u pa…¨~…ģamso~u to~u o~u sasamaan…ôn. r…ôo~u~ut…ôrs …¨~…ģw ko~uwapiŇč ira i insta*ram, maŇča °aj miki…ĺim i …¨~…ģw. ¶ńßin…ôs…ô, misata…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇč masapinaŇč ko~u ¶o~u~uka ato~u piparato~uńß. * **** mińß…ô ¶a *…ôrmanj …ĺa ¶iw (Ňčińßa) sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ paini: o~unini …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ni so~uwa…ĺan ira ko~u sa…¨~…ģama to~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶, ano~u awaaj ko~u nano~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u *…ôrmanj …ĺa ¶iw (Ňčińßa), tatiińß mi…¨~…ģ…ômak. maanan ¶aajaj ka tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u mami…ĺita…¨~…ģańß, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u rik…ô ¶ a sat…ôfo~u ¶.
S.FORM: == Samaanen milekakawa "Misatatad to Taywan"? == "No toic ngiha kowaping calay" paini to salongoc no Taywan, Taywan ato Congko sifo saki "misatatad" a salicylic pisapinangan, saka I'ayawen ko sakafana' to saca'of: I likisi no Taywan ato aniniay pangangan Sa'ayaway maro'ay finawlan o nisowal a "Yincumin" finacadan, o tato'asan nangra pinapinaay to ko patekan no miheca ma'orip tonini a kanatal. I 17 sician, o Netherlan tamdaw ato Spain tamdaw micalap to alongan sa'etal no Taywan. O Europe tamdaw pako "Formosa" saan ko pitahidang to Taywan itiya. Mancin i 1684 miheca pala no Fujian sakowan ko Taywan, tangasa i 1885 miheca pala o cecayay to sa'etal no Congko demakan ko Taywan. Mapidah ko Congko i saki Jiawu laloodan, o Macin i 1895 miheca mapakelac ko Dipong to Taywan, nicalapan no Dipong itiya. I 1945 miheca paherek ko saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, mapatodong ko Conghua minko sifo ko Taywan. Ikor malalood ko laloma'an no kitakit, o Congko kongcantang mipidahay to sofitay no KMT, nanoya i 1949 miheca laliwan no Komin sifo a tayni Taywan, ikor masiday ko Conghua minko a kacingangan. Ci Mao Zedong itira i Congko patireng to Conghua renmin sakapot sifo, mihapiw o dayhiw no Congko (halo Taywan) dengan marecokay sifo, ato midotocay to salongoc no Conghua minko. Paenarar i kasakitakit a Taywan Ikor no pinapina mo'etep mihecaan, itiniay i Taypi a Conghua minko sifo mihapiw to o tada cisalongocay to Congko a sifo saan. nika i 1971 miheca, Linhoko mihayda milayap to Conghua renmin lekapot o dengan dayhiw no Congko, oya Conghua minko sifo sa'icel sa to " caay ko mamalatosa" ko pakayraan saan a miliyas to Linhoko. Ikor to, o kasakitakit ala patiretireng sa to Congko no sakipapotal kakiharan, makaketon to Taypi. Tahamatini ira ho ko 12 kasacofelan kitakit to Taywan, saheto katimolay Taypinyang ato Caribbean riyar a kanatal kitakit, tinako Tuvalu, Belize. Masamatira, o 'alomanay Europ a kitakit ira ko kasasikihar to caayay ko no sifo a kaainian, mihayda to passport no Taywan , saka o Taywan ato nia kitakit ira i tadamanay maci patireng to kadademakan no Tarokos a citodongay Dayhiw. O finawlan no Taywan micomod to 'alomanay kitakit caay pitoki to fica. O Amilika nai 1979 miheca makaketon ko kasakihar to Taywan, nika midotoc to sarikec padamso to todong no sapidama. Midotoc to no Washington "cecay ko Congko" a telek, o Amilika to saki salongoc no Taywan awaay ko pali'ayaw no kaitiraan. Saka caay pisawad ko Congko sapiloodaw to Taywan to sapi'emet. Ono Beijing pasi Taywan ko pasadak to matiyaay no Hongkong to "Cecay kitakit tosa ko sakowan" a todong, mitelek paini to satakaraway a niyah pikowan. Nika awaay ko cecay a kasarekad ko micokeray tonini a todong. O pisolap to finawlan no Taywan i, no Taywan tamdaw mangalay oyanan to ko kasasikihar 'alomanay finawlan. Doedoen ko no Congko a sowal, i 1971 miheca mihayda ko Linhoko saka 2758 haw a nitelakan pasowal o Conghua renmin kapolongan o cecay matatodongay sifo a Congko saan, o nian ko pikotay no Beijing to Taypi itira i Linhoko kaitiraan no Congko, o saka saan i sarikec no kasakitakit mihai t oTaywan ono Congko. O papotalay kakeridan no Congko: 2758 haw nitelakan awaay ko kaoratan, o papotalay kakeridan no Taywan: o papaterep to sapiorat to kasakitakit saan. Taypi sifo miliyang o caay ho ka patireng konini, nawhani nitelekan awaay masowal ko Taywan ato salongoc a todong. O Masatataday to kitakit ko Taywan? Pakoniyah sa ko finawlan no Taywan misinkiw to kakeridan tamdaw, ira ko piemet no Taywan a sifo to nitelekan a sofal, ira ko no niyah a sofitay, payso ato passport. Talacowa caay ka sangila' ko pihayda no 'alomanay kitakit, nika so'elin ko piraoy to misatekeday a kaitiraan. Sowal sa ko sifo no Taywan, o cecay cikowanay kitakit ko Conghua minko, awaay ko todong no Beijing. O roma sato, ona caay ho pikowan ko Congko to Taywan, saka awaay ko tatodong mihidefong to pisingkiw no Taywan to kakeridan tamdaw. Falicen ko ngangan Taywan nikapolongan kitakit han? Ano haenen caay ko rahodayay, ano caay pihayda ko Lifayin misalof to kimpo, ta midemak to polong no finawlan kapolongan pitopa, caay ko ni Lai Cingde congtong rahodayay a pihapiw manga'ayto. Pisalof to kimpo itini i Lifayin salongan sepat malitoloay ko Lifawiyin micokeray ta mahayda. Oya citodongay mikowan a Mincintang ato papotalay Komintang itini i Lifayin a ngangan a tamdaw mato malalenay. Nai 2016 mihecaan padoedo mikowan a Mincintang awaay ko sapicikerohaw to sapifalic to kimpo. Oya papotalay Komintang masamawmaw miliyang to sapifalicaw to ngangan. Masamaan ko sowal ko congtong no Taywan? I'ayaw to piapina miheca 'ayaw no pisingkiw to congtong ni Lai Cingde i mato o mamilaheci to "Misatatad to Taywan a matayalay" kako sanay ningra, o "Micikcikay tamdaw" saan ko Beijing i cingraan. Sacisowal sa ci Lai Cingde, o niyah harateng i, o Taywan haw i o cecay misatatadan a kitakit, orasaka mimaan ho mihapiw misatatad. Na macakat i 2024 mihecaan i, kinapinapina paini ci Lai Cingde, o Conghua minko ato Conghua renmin nikapolongan "caay ka sasi niraay", sacisowal sa ko Beijing, onini to paratatenga ningra to Congko ato Taywan o masasitataday kitakit, orasaka oninian ko sapicikeroh to Misatatad to Taywan sanay a sowalan. Ira ko pidoedoan rikec sapifo'ot no Congko to Misatatad no Taywan haw? I 2005 miheca 3 folad, Congko laovcan mihayda to "Miliyang micikcik to kitakit a rikec", o patodong no Congko to i Taywanay "micikcikay to kitakit" ano eca "palasawaday to saka lekapot a todong" saki Taywan o papakayni i lalood no sofitay a demak ko pidoedoan no rikec, nika onini a rikec o madodemay, awaay ko padamso to o sasamaanen. Reuters DW kowaping ira i Instagram, manga'ay mikilim i dw. chinese, misatalolong masapinang ko cuka ato piparatoh. ¬© 2025 miheca Germany laciw (ngiha) salongoc paini: onini laloma' ni sowalan ira ko sadama to mitiliday salongoc, ano awaay ko nano patodong no Germany laciw (ngiha), tatiih midemak. Maanan caayay ka tatodong o mamilitadah, citodong to rikec a satefoc.
S.PHON: == samaan…ôn mi…ĺ…ôkakawa "misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan"? == "no~u to~ui ¶ Ňčińßa ko~uwapiŇč ¶a…ĺaj" paini to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u tajwan, tajwan ato~u ¶o~uŇčko~u sifo~u saki "misatata…¨~…ģ" a sa…ĺi ¶j…ĺi ¶ pisapinaŇčan, saka i °ajaw…ôn ko~u sakafana ° to~u sa ¶a °o~uf: i …ĺikisi no~u tajwan ato~u aniniaj paŇčaŇčan sa °ajawaj maro~u °aj finaw…ĺan o~u niso~uwa…ĺ a "jin ¶o~u~umin" fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u tato~u °asan naŇčra pinapinaaj to~u ko~u pat…ôkan no~u mińß…ô ¶a ma °o~urip to~unini a kanata…ĺ. i ** si ¶ian, o~u n…ôtńß…ôr…ĺan tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u spain tam…¨~…ģaw mi ¶a…ĺap to~u a…ĺo~uŇčan sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u tajwan. o~u …ôo~u~uro~up…ô tam…¨~…ģaw pako~u "fo~urmo~usa" saan ko~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u tajwan itija. man ¶in i **** mińß…ô ¶a pa…ĺa no~u fo~u~ujian sako~uwan ko~u tajwan, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a pa…ĺa o~u ¶…ô ¶ajaj to~u sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u …¨~…ģ…ômakan ko~u tajwan. mapi…¨~…ģańß ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u i saki *iawo~u~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan, o~u ma ¶in i **** mińß…ô ¶a mapak…ô…ĺa ¶ ko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u tajwan, ni ¶a…ĺapan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itija. i **** mińß…ô ¶a pańß…ôr…ôk ko~u saka * ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, mapato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u sifo~u ko~u tajwan. iko~ur ma…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u kitakit, o~u ¶o~uŇčko~u ko~uŇč ¶antaŇč mipi…¨~…ģańßaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u kmt, nano~uja i **** mińß…ô ¶a …ĺa…ĺiwan no~u ko~umin sifo~u a tajni tajwan, iko~ur masi…¨~…ģaj ko~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u a ka ¶iŇčaŇčan. ¶i mao~u *…ô…¨~…ģo~uŇč itira i ¶o~uŇčko~u patir…ôŇč to~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua r…ônmin sakapo~ut sifo~u, mińßapiw o~u …¨~…ģajńßiw no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u (ńßa…ĺo~u tajwan) …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan mar…ô ¶o~ukaj sifo~u, ato~u mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶aj to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u. pa…ônarar i kasakitakit a tajwan iko~ur no~u pinapina mo~u °…ôt…ôp mińß…ô ¶aan, itiniaj i tajpi a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u sifo~u mińßapiw to~u o~u ta…¨~…ģa ¶isa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶aj to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u a sifo~u saan. nika i **** mińß…ô ¶a, …ĺinńßo~uko~u mińßaj…¨~…ģa mi…ĺajap to~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua r…ônmin …ĺ…ôkapo~ut o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan …¨~…ģajńßiw no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u, o~uja ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u sifo~u sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ sa to~u " ¶aaj ko~u mama…ĺato~usa" ko~u pakajraan saan a mi…ĺijas to~u …ĺinńßo~uko~u. iko~ur to~u, o~u kasakitakit a…ĺa patir…ôtir…ôŇč sa to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u no~u sakipapo~uta…ĺ kakińßaran, makak…ôto~un to~u tajpi. tańßamatini ira ńßo~u ko~u ** kasa ¶o~uf…ô…ĺan kitakit to~u tajwan, sańß…ôto~u katimo~u…ĺaj tajpinjaŇč ato~u ¶arib~b~vb~b~v…ôan rijar a kanata…ĺ kitakit, tinako~u to~u~ub~va…ĺo~u~u, b~b~v…ô…ĺi*…ô. masamatira, o~u °a…ĺo~umanaj …ôo~u~uro~up a kitakit ira ko~u kasasikińßar to~u ¶aajaj ko~u no~u sifo~u a kaainian, mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~u passpo~urt no~u tajwan , saka o~u tajwan ato~u nia kitakit ira i ta…¨~…ģamanaj ma ¶i patir…ôŇč to~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômakan no~u taro~uko~us a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj …¨~…ģajńßiw. o~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °a…ĺo~umanaj kitakit ¶aaj pito~uki to~u fi ¶a. o~u ami…ĺika nai **** mińß…ô ¶a makak…ôto~un ko~u kasakińßar to~u tajwan, nika mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u sarik…ô ¶ pa…¨~…ģamso~u to~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u sapi…¨~…ģama. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u no~u wasńßiŇčto~un " ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u" a t…ô…ĺ…ôk, o~u ami…ĺika to~u saki sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u tajwan awaaj ko~u pa…ĺi °ajaw no~u kaitiraan. saka ¶aaj pisawa…¨~…ģ ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u sapi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģaw to~u tajwan to~u sapi °…ôm…ôt. o~uno~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč pasi tajwan ko~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~u matijaaj no~u ńßo~uŇčko~uŇč to~u " ¶…ô ¶aj kitakit to~usa ko~u sako~uwan" a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk paini to~u satakarawaj a nijańß piko~uwan. nika awaaj ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a kasar…ôka…¨~…ģ ko~u mi ¶o~uk…ôraj to~unini a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč. o~u piso~u…ĺap to~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan i, no~u tajwan tam…¨~…ģaw maŇča…ĺaj o~ujanan to~u ko~u kasasikińßar °a…ĺo~umanaj finaw…ĺan. …¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u…ôn ko~u no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u a so~uwa…ĺ, i **** mińß…ô ¶a mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u …ĺinńßo~uko~u saka **** ńßaw a nit…ô…ĺakan paso~uwa…ĺ o~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua r…ônmin kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan o~u ¶…ô ¶aj matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj sifo~u a ¶o~uŇčko~u saan, o~u nian ko~u piko~utaj no~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč to~u tajpi itira i …ĺinńßo~uko~u kaitiraan no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u, o~u saka saan i sarik…ô ¶ no~u kasakitakit mińßai t o~utajwan o~uno~u ¶o~uŇčko~u. o~u papo~uta…ĺaj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u: **** ńßaw nit…ô…ĺakan awaaj ko~u kao~uratan, o~u papo~uta…ĺaj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan: o~u papat…ôr…ôp to~u sapio~urat to~u kasakitakit saan. tajpi sifo~u mi…ĺijaŇč o~u ¶aaj ńßo~u ka patir…ôŇč ko~unini, nawńßani nit…ô…ĺ…ôkan awaaj maso~uwa…ĺ ko~u tajwan ato~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč. o~u masatata…¨~…ģaj to~u kitakit ko~u tajwan? pako~unijańß sa ko~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan misinkiw to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw, ira ko~u pi…ôm…ôt no~u tajwan a sifo~u to~u nit…ô…ĺ…ôkan a so~ufa…ĺ, ira ko~u no~u nijańß a so~ufitaj, pajso~u ato~u passpo~urt. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ka saŇči…ĺa ° ko~u pińßaj…¨~…ģa no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj kitakit, nika so~u °…ô…ĺin ko~u pirao~uj to~u misat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj a kaitiraan. so~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u sifo~u no~u tajwan, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj ¶iko~uwanaj kitakit ko~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u, awaaj ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč. o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~una ¶aaj ńßo~u piko~uwan ko~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u tajwan, saka awaaj ko~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mińßi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč to~u pisiŇčkiw no~u tajwan to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw. fa…ĺi ¶…ôn ko~u ŇčaŇčan tajwan nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan kitakit ńßan? ano~u ńßa…ôn…ôn ¶aaj ko~u rańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj, ano~u ¶aaj pińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u …ĺifajin misa…ĺo~uf to~u kimpo~u, ta mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finaw…ĺan kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan pito~upa, ¶aaj ko~u ni …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč rańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj a pińßapiw maŇča °ajto~u. pisa…ĺo~uf to~u kimpo~u itini i …ĺifajin sa…ĺo~uŇčan s…ôpat ma…ĺito~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u …ĺifawijin mi ¶o~uk…ôraj ta mańßaj…¨~…ģa. o~uja ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj miko~uwan a min ¶intaŇč ato~u papo~uta…ĺaj ko~umintaŇč itini i …ĺifajin a ŇčaŇčan a tam…¨~…ģaw mato~u ma…ĺa…ĺ…ônaj. nai **** mińß…ô ¶aan pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u miko~uwan a min ¶intaŇč awaaj ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńßaw to~u sapifa…ĺi ¶ to~u kimpo~u. o~uja papo~uta…ĺaj ko~umintaŇč masamawmaw mi…ĺijaŇč to~u sapifa…ĺi ¶aw to~u ŇčaŇčan. masamaan ko~u so~uwa…ĺ ko~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč no~u tajwan? i °ajaw to~u piapina mińß…ô ¶a °ajaw no~u pisiŇčkiw to~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ni …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô i mato~u o~u mami…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u "misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan a mataja…ĺaj" kako~u sanaj niŇčra, o~u "mi ¶ik ¶ikaj tam…¨~…ģaw" saan ko~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč i ¶iŇčraan. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ¶i …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô, o~u nijańß ńßarat…ôŇč i, o~u tajwan ńßaw i o~u ¶…ô ¶aj misatata…¨~…ģan a kitakit, o~urasaka mimaan ńßo~u mińßapiw misatata…¨~…ģ. na ma ¶akat i **** mińß…ô ¶aan i, kinapinapina paini ¶i …ĺai ¶iŇč…¨~…ģ…ô, o~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua minko~u ato~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~ua r…ônmin nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan " ¶aaj ka sasi niraaj", sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u b~b~v…ôijiŇč, o~unini to~u paratat…ôŇča niŇčra to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u ato~u tajwan o~u masasitata…¨~…ģaj kitakit, o~urasaka o~uninian ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u misatata…¨~…ģ to~u tajwan sanaj a so~uwa…ĺan. ira ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan rik…ô ¶ sapifo~u °o~ut no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u misatata…¨~…ģ no~u tajwan ńßaw? i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶o~uŇčko~u …ĺao~ub~v ¶an mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~u "mi…ĺijaŇč mi ¶ik ¶ik to~u kitakit a rik…ô ¶", o~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u to~u i tajwanaj "mi ¶ik ¶ikaj to~u kitakit" ano~u …ô ¶a "pa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģaj to~u saka …ĺ…ôkapo~ut a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč" saki tajwan o~u papakajni i …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u so~ufitaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan no~u rik…ô ¶, nika o~unini a rik…ô ¶ o~u ma…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģ…ômaj, awaaj ko~u pa…¨~…ģamso~u to~u o~u sasamaan…ôn. r…ôo~u~ut…ôrs …¨~…ģw ko~uwapiŇč ira i insta*ram, maŇča °aj miki…ĺim i …¨~…ģw. ¶ńßin…ôs…ô, misata…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇč masapinaŇč ko~u ¶o~u~uka ato~u piparato~uńß. * **** mińß…ô ¶a *…ôrmanj …ĺa ¶iw (Ňčińßa) sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ paini: o~unini …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ni so~uwa…ĺan ira ko~u sa…¨~…ģama to~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶, ano~u awaaj ko~u nano~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u *…ôrmanj …ĺa ¶iw (Ňčińßa), tatiińß mi…¨~…ģ…ômak. maanan ¶aajaj ka tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u mami…ĺita…¨~…ģańß, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u rik…ô ¶ a sat…ôfo~u ¶.
